export.errorMessage: Failed to download report. Please try again.

noData: No data available for the selected filters.

statusSummary.title: Case Status Distribution
statusSummary.description: Breakdown of all cases by current status within the selected period.

volumeTrend.title: New Cases Over Time
volumeTrend.description: Daily count of new cases opened within the selected period.

resolution.title: Case Resolution Metrics
resolution.description: Closed case count, resolution rate, and average case age within the selected period.

typeBreakdown.title: Evidence by Type
typeBreakdown.description: Distribution of evidence items logged by type within the selected period.

volumeTrend.title: Evidence Volume Over Time
volumeTrend.description: Daily count of evidence items logged within the selected period.

unreviewed.title: Unreviewed Evidence
unreviewed.description: Evidence items collected within the period that have not yet been reviewed.
unreviewed.allReviewed: All evidence within the period has been reviewed.

monthlyTrend.title: Monthly Arrest Trend
monthlyTrend.description: Arrest count aggregated by month within the selected period.

workload.title: Active Case Load
workload.description: Current active case count per officer, plus cases opened and closed within the period.

activity.title: Officer Activity Metrics
activity.description: Evidence logged, interrogations conducted, and arrests recorded per officer within the period.

chargeOutcomes.title: Charge Outcomes
chargeOutcomes.description: Breakdown of charge outcomes (conviction, acquittal, dropped, pending) within the period.

convictionTrend.title: Conviction Rate Trend
convictionTrend.description: Monthly conviction rate percentage within the selected period.

upcomingHearings.title: Upcoming Hearings
upcomingHearings.description: Scheduled court hearings within the selected date range.
upcomingHearings.empty: No hearings scheduled in the selected period.

departments.accessDenied: Department reports are available to administrators only.

comparison.title: Department Comparison
comparison.description: Side-by-side performance metrics for all departments within the selected period.

caseDistribution.title: Case Distribution by Department
caseDistribution.description: Proportion of total cases assigned to each department within the period.
